intro: Pelea haleakalana, also known as the Haleakala pelea or Ma'o hau hele, is a flowering plant species native to the Hawaiian Islands. The health benefits of Pelea haleakalana are attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and combat infections.
